evidence_hint: src/meta_schema.ts:105 `root[key]=SCALAR(rest)`, :161 `map[mm[1]]=SCALAR(mm[2])`, :202 `fields[f.name]=val`; src/inject.ts:37 `result[kv[1]]=val.replace(...)`. loadMetaSchema (src/inventory.ts:77) feeds an operator schema file into these key-assignment sinks with no __proto__/constructor/prototype guard.
residual_if_not_resolved: Add a shared reserved-key guard (`if(key==='__proto__'||key==='constructor'||key==='prototype')continue;`) at each parsed-key assignment, or build maps with Object.create(null).
